filename.guidance: Path to the filtered_feature_bc_matrix.h5 file from Cell Ranger output.

genome.guidance: Genome annotation to use. Required only for multi-genome references.

gex_only.guidance: If true, only load gene expression features (exclude antibody capture, CRISPR, etc.).

outputs.adata: AnnData object with raw counts in adata.X

validation.check: Call adata.var_names_make_unique() if duplicate gene names detected.
